$schema: Per-section budget for raw `<input>` and `<button>` elements that have NOT been migrated to the shared components/ui primitives. The number is the count, captured at the end of PR 9. The check fails when a section's count goes UP (drift toward inline) OR DOWN (progress unrecorded — drop the threshold to lock in the win).

AdminUsersSection.tsx.reason: Fully migrated in PR 2 (pilot). All form inputs use FormField + TextInput, all buttons use PrimaryButton / IconButton.

AppearanceSection.tsx.reason: Theme-toggle cards use a single aria-pressed `<button>` per option. ToggleCard primitive would have one consumer; not extracted.

BaselinesSection.tsx.reason: Largest Settings section with deeply custom UI: per-tier rate inputs, version timeline, refresh-pricing modal, archived-tab swap, and the SolarTech ↔ Product Catalog parity surfaces. PR 1 wired the inline validateProductName to the shared validateName; full primitive migration is deferred because the surface is too risky to migrate in one shot. -3 buttons 2026-05-15 (tab-row → SegmentedPills). -2 buttons 2026-06-16 (Phase 3 A2: retired in-place 'Bulk Adjust' toggle buttons). -4 inputs/-4 buttons 2026-06-17 (Phase 3 A2 cleanup: deleted the two unreachable Bulk Adjust panels + their orphaned in-place bulk-tier-adjust endpoint/wrappers). Remaining raw elements are the legacy archive-view read-only table + add-product/refresh-version modals, a separate future migration.

BlitzPermissionsSection.tsx.reason: PR 8 migrated the search bar. Remaining buttons: 4 role-filter pills (custom segmented control with gradient highlight), 2 toggle switches per row (custom 9x5 switch UI), 2 bulk-action subtle-tinted buttons (Grant/Revoke). All are custom patterns with one consumer each.

CustomizationSection.tsx.reason: PR 5 fully migrated. The custom toggle for the stalled-digest enable flag was replaced with the shared Switch primitive (added 2026-05-05) — same component now used by InstallerHandoffPanel.

ExportSection.tsx.reason: PR 8 migrated the date inputs and the Download CSV button. Remaining: 4 selectable export-cards (custom multi-select with hover-lift) and 1 'Clear dates' subtle text-button. SelectableCard would have one consumer.

FinancersSection.tsx.reason: PR 6 migrated the add-form, search, and row-hover icon buttons. Remaining: select-mode toggle button, 'Select all' link in the active+archived list headers, archived-section disclosure ChevronDown button. All custom multi-select choreography.

InstallersSection.tsx.reason: PR 9 migrated the add-form, search, and empty state. Remaining 4 inputs: 3 micro-text (text-xs) inline-edit inputs in the prepaid-options panel and pay-schedule edit, 1 family-name input in the PC-mode add form. Remaining buttons: standard/PC segmented selector (2), select-mode toggle (1), select-all (1), archived-section disclosure (1), row-hover icon stagger (3 config icons per active row; archive/delete moved into the shared RowActionsMenu kebab in T1.7, 2 per archived row), prepaid-options expansion add/edit/save/cancel/delete (5), pay-schedule expansion (varies). 20→18 in T1.7 (2026-06-10): archive + delete row buttons replaced by RowActionsMenu.

InstallerHandoffPanel.tsx.reason: Per-installer handoff email config editor (added 2026-04-29 for BVI integration). Inputs/textarea use TextInput/FormField primitives. Toggle switch migrated to the shared Switch primitive on 2026-05-05.

NotificationsSection.tsx.reason: Per-user notification preferences UI. All bulk-state toggles use the Switch primitive; cadence selectors use native <select>. The 3 raw buttons are collapse-toggle headers (category cards, DevicePushToggle, PhoneQuietHoursCard) — disclosure widgets, not actions. PrimaryButton/IconButton don't fit the header-card pattern (no chevron rotation slot, full-row tap target). 2026-05-17.

PMSection.tsx.reason: PR 7 migrated the add-form and row-delete. Remaining 1 button: 3 permission-toggle pills per PM row (Create Deals / Blitz / Export); these are custom toggle-pill UI.
